data.acceptance:
1. `/beats?view=overview` renders visible columns grouped by beat state.
2. Overview tiles are denser than the prior stacked-card prototype and show id/alias, title, priority, type, updated time, and parent/repo context when present.
3. The overview remains non-kanban: no draggable cards, no drop zones, and clicking a tile only opens the existing beat detail lightbox.
4. Browser verification confirms desktop and mobile layouts have no page-level horizontal overflow.
5. Lease-type beats are filtered out of the overview surface.
